ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "maxtempC" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "mintempC" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "totalSnow_cm" INTEGER /* Total snowfall in centimeters */,
  "sunHour" REAL /* Sunlight hours */,
  "uvIndex" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "moon_illumination" INTEGER /* Moon illumination percentage */,
  "moonrise" TEXT /* Moonrise time */,
  "moonset" TEXT /* Moonset time */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Sunrise time */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Sunset time */,
  "DewPointC" INTEGER /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "FeelsLikeC" INTEGER /* Feels like temperature in Celsius */,
  "HeatIndexC" INTEGER /* Heat index temperature in Celsius */,
  "WindChillC" INTEGER /* Wind chill temperature in Celsius */,
  "WindGustKmph" INTEGER /* Wind gust speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "cloudcover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "precipMM" INTEGER /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "tempC" INTEGER /* Current temperature in Celsius */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "winddirDegree" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "windspeedKmph" INTEGER /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection frequency */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_time", "location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES data_collection_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data accessed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_data ("date_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the version was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_data ("date_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file for integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the data */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_data ("date_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the data */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Quality status of the data */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the data quality */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the quality record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_data ("date_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)
